Experience the Mediterranean: Unique Boat Tours in Malaga, Marbella & Estepona

Your gateway to unforgettable adventures on the Costa del Sol. Based in Marbella, Puerto Banus, and Estepona, we don’t just rent boats; we create lifelong memories aboard our exclusive fleet.

About Our Boat Charters

Sail the Costa del Sol with Rumbomed’s Expertise

Experience the Costa del Sol like never before. At Rumbomed, we turn a sailing day into a tailor-made experience. With over 15 years of experience scouting the best routes between Malaga, Marbella, and Estepona, we guarantee exclusive moments and impeccable service in every mile.

Your peace of mind and enjoyment are our main mission.

0
Happy Guests
0
Years of Experience

Why Sail with Rumbomed?

Strategic Locations

Departures available from the finest ports in Marbella, Puerto Banus, and Estepona.

Premium Fleet

Modern, fully-serviced vessels ensuring your absolute safety and comfort at sea.

24/7 Support

Continuous assistance so your only concern is enjoying the Mediterranean breeze.

Featured Experiences

Discover our Exclusive Boat Routes

Top Pick

Dolphin Watching

2 hours Max 12

Enjoy the company of dolphins in the wild. A magical experience sailing along the Costa del Sol.

Info Book Now
New

Fishing Charter

4 hours Max 6

Sport fishing trip with professional gear. Perfect for enjoying a quiet and productive morning.

Info Book Now
Romantic

Sunset Cruise

1.5 hours Max 12

Relax with the colors of the sunset from the sea. Includes a welcome glass of Cava.

Info Book Now

Ready to set sail?

Don’t leave for tomorrow the sea you can sail today. Send us an inquiry, and we will design the perfect Costa del Sol route for you.

DIRECT ASSISTANCE
